description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a low, angular profile with heavy, faceted armor plating covering its entire body. The exterior is predominantly matte black, with sharp, geometric panels and reinforced wheel arches. The vehicle is equipped with four large, rugged off-road tires, each with deep treads for enhanced traction. The front end is wedge-shaped, with a central intake and armored panels extending over the wheels, while the rear displays a robust, multi-tire configuration and visible suspension components. The roof and sides are adorned with additional armor fins and vents, suggesting advanced protection and cooling. No visible weapon mounts, camouflage, or military markings are present, emphasizing its stealthy, armored design.
description: A heavily armored, matte black tactical vehicle with angular panels and large off-road tires, designed for urban combat scenarios. Its faceted exterior and robust build suggest high durability and protection.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular, faceted armor panels, large off-road tires, and layered rear armor fins.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wedge-shaped nose, central intake, and reinforced wheel arches.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the angular armor and tire configuration, with visible door outlines.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the dual rear tires on each side, robust suspension, and layered rear armor.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular, sloped armor panels; reinforced wheel arches and layered rear armor fins.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; reinforced sidewalls.
